mapper.select: SELECT CAST(${tableSpec.statDateColumn} AS CHAR) AS statDate, ${tableSpec.orderCountExpression} AS orderCount, ${tableSpec.paidOrderCountExpression} AS paidOrderCount, ${tableSpec.unpaidOrderCountExpression} AS unpaidOrderCount, ${tableSpec.closedOrderCountExpression} AS closedOrderCount, ${tableSpec.totalAmountExpression} AS totalAmount, ${tableSpec.paidAmountExpression} AS paidAmount, ${tableSpec.refundAmountExpression} AS refundAmount, ${tableSpec.paySuccessRateExpression} AS paySuccessRate FROM ${tableSpec.tableName} WHERE ${tableSpec.statDateColumn} >= #{startDate} AND ${tableSpec.statDateColumn} <= #{endDate} ORDER BY ${tableSpec.statDateColumn} ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ods_wx_order ( order_id, order_no, external_order_no, biz_type, order_source, order_title, order_description, buyer_id, buyer_nickname, currency, total_amount_fen, payable_amount_fen, paid_amount_fen, refunded_amount_fen, order_status, pay_status, preferred_pay_platform, preferred_trade_type, success_pay_platform, latest_payment_order_no, latest_channel_order_no, paid_time, expired_time, closed_time, cancelled_time, remark, ext_json, version, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, sync_time ) VALUES
( #{item.orderId}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.externalOrderNo}, #{item.bizType}, #{item.orderSource}, #{item.orderTitle}, #{item.orderDescription}, #{item.buyerId}, #{item.buyerNickname}, #{item.currency}, #{item.totalAmountFen}, #{item.payableAmountFen}, #{item.paidAmountFen}, #{item.refundedAmountFen}, #{item.orderStatus}, #{item.payStatus}, #{item.preferredPayPlatform}, #{item.preferredTradeType}, #{item.successPayPlatform}, #{item.latestPaymentOrderNo}, #{item.latestChannelOrderNo}, #{item.paidTime}, #{item.expiredTime}, #{item.closedTime}, #{item.cancelledTime}, #{item.remark}, #{item.extJson}, #{item.version}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.updatedBy}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO ods_wx_payment_order ( payment_order_id, payment_order_no, order_id, order_no, platform, trade_type, merchant_code, channel_app_id, channel_merchant_id, subject, description, currency, request_amount_fen, success_amount_fen, payer_id, client_ip, notify_url, channel_order_no, channel_prepay_id, code_url, status, fail_code, fail_message, expired_time, success_time, closed_time, last_notify_time, ext_json, version, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, sync_time ) VALUES
( #{item.paymentOrderId}, #{item.paymentOrderNo}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.platform}, #{item.tradeType}, #{item.merchantCode}, #{item.channelAppId}, #{item.channelMerchantId}, #{item.subject}, #{item.description}, #{item.currency}, #{item.requestAmountFen}, #{item.successAmountFen}, #{item.payerId}, #{item.clientIp}, #{item.notifyUrl}, #{item.channelOrderNo}, #{item.channelPrepayId}, #{item.codeUrl}, #{item.status}, #{item.failCode}, #{item.failMessage}, #{item.expiredTime}, #{item.successTime}, #{item.closedTime}, #{item.lastNotifyTime}, #{item.extJson}, #{item.version}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.updatedBy}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO ods_wx_payment_notify ( notify_log_id, notify_id, platform, notify_type, payment_order_id, payment_order_no, order_id, order_no, channel_order_no, event_type, event_status, summary, request_headers_json, request_body, encrypt_type, resource_ciphertext, resource_nonce, resource_associated_data, signature_serial_no, signature_value, process_status, process_message, processed_at, received_at, ext_json, sync_time ) VALUES
( #{item.notifyLogId}, #{item.notifyId}, #{item.platform}, #{item.notifyType}, #{item.paymentOrderId}, #{item.paymentOrderNo}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.channelOrderNo}, #{item.eventType}, #{item.eventStatus}, #{item.summary}, #{item.requestHeadersJson}, #{item.requestBody}, #{item.encryptType}, #{item.resourceCiphertext}, #{item.resourceNonce}, #{item.resourceAssociatedData}, #{item.signatureSerialNo}, #{item.signatureValue}, #{item.processStatus}, #{item.processMessage}, #{item.processedAt}, #{item.receivedAt}, #{item.extJson}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO dw_sync_job ( job_code, job_name, source_type, source_tables, target_tables, enabled, remark, last_run_status, last_run_message, last_run_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{job.jobCode}, #{job.jobName}, #{job.sourceType}, #{job.sourceTables}, #{job.targetTables}, #{job.enabled}, #{job.remark}, #{job.lastRunStatus}, #{job.lastRunMessage}, #{job.lastRunAt}, #{job.createdAt}, #{job.updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO dw_sync_job_log ( log_id, job_code, job_name, run_status, message, synced_order_count, synced_payment_order_count, synced_notify_log_count, started_at, finished_at, duration_ms, created_at ) VALUES ( #{log.logId}, #{log.jobCode}, #{log.jobName}, #{log.runStatus}, #{log.message}, #{log.syncedOrderCount}, #{log.syncedPaymentOrderCount}, #{log.syncedNotifyLogCount}, #{log.startedAt}, #{log.finishedAt}, #{log.durationMs}, #{log.createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT CAST(log_id AS CHAR) AS logId, CAST(job_code AS CHAR) AS jobCode, CAST(job_name AS CHAR) AS jobName, CAST(run_status AS CHAR) AS runStatus, CAST(message AS CHAR) AS message, synced_order_count AS syncedOrderCount, synced_payment_order_count AS syncedPaymentOrderCount, synced_notify_log_count AS syncedNotifyLogCount, started_at AS startedAt, finished_at AS finishedAt, duration_ms AS durationMs, created_at AS createdAt FROM dw_sync_job_log WHERE job_code = #{jobCode} ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT ${tableSpec.ruleCodeExpression} AS ruleCode, ${tableSpec.ruleNameExpression} AS ruleName, ${tableSpec.tableNameExpression} AS tableName, ${tableSpec.resultStatusExpression} AS resultStatus, ${tableSpec.resultLevelExpression} AS resultLevel, ${tableSpec.failedCountExpression} AS failedCount, ${tableSpec.totalCountExpression} AS totalCount, ${tableSpec.messageExpression} AS message, ${tableSpec.checkedAtExpression} AS checkedAt FROM ${tableSpec.tableName} ORDER BY ${tableSpec.checkedAtOrderExpression} DESC LIMIT #{limit}
